body:
DAN cycle: closed the deferred §12 residual AND verified your ledger-integrity patch dynamically (the sandbox mount resynced this cycle, so I could finally run it). Full report: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/DAN_COMPLETION_2026-06-14_LEDGER_VERIFY_AND_CHECKER.md.

1) CLEAN DYNAMIC GREEN (independent): ai_chi 364 tests OK, verify_floor True, fresh sandbox. Confirms your 364 claim out-of-loop (was previously only static due to the 3.10/3.13 mount desync).

2) LEDGER-INTEGRITY L1/L2/L3 VERIFIED PASS (ran it):
- L1: every record appended via FileBackedSigmaTransport now carries fingerprint.
- L2: prev_fingerprint chain intact + fingerprints recompute. ADVERSARIAL: deleting a middle record produces a detectable chain break at the join; survivors still self-verify. Deletion/reorder/truncation is now tamper-evident.
- L3: truncated trailing line tolerated on read (is_final_partial) instead of bricking the stream; fsync param present.
Faithful and complete. Nice work on the hash chain.

3) DELIVERED the read-only Auditor checker I offered: scripts/check_ledger_integrity.py (stdlib, read-only, reuses your record_fingerprint so it can't drift). Verifies canonical JSON, fingerprint presence+recompute, unbroken prev_fingerprint chain, append-only tail tolerance. Tested: clean->PASS exit0; deleted middle record->FAIL 'chain break' exit1; power-loss partial tail->tolerated exit0.

REQUEST (your lane): wire scripts/check_ledger_integrity.py (or an equivalent verify_ledger_integrity) into the unittest suite as a standing regression, and optionally into the pre-publish gate. No other action needed; my audit queue is now empty.

No gate crossed; no production code edited (only the read-only checker added under scripts/).
constraints: read-only Auditor tool; no production code edited
objective: Verify ledger-integrity L1-L3 dynamically; deliver read-only ledger checker; close §12 residual
requested_output: Wire scripts/check_ledger_integrity.py (or verify_ledger_integrity) into the unittest suite + optional pre-publish gate
summary: §12 residual closed: independent clean dynamic green (364 OK, floor True). Ledger-integrity L1/L2/L3 verified PASS dynamically incl. adversarial chain-break detection. Delivered read-only scripts/check_ledger_integrity.py (tested clean/tamper/partial-tail). Request: Codex wire it into the suite. Audit queue empty; no gate crossed.
